lines.speaker: Julia
lines.text: I'm blending in. Scopin' out the place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you preparing for a heist? You're only a kid.

lines.speaker: Julia
lines.text: Let's just say there are some wealthy people about, with full pockets.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any tips? I'm not having much luck myself.

lines.speaker: Julia
lines.text: I'm quite sneaky. Every now and then I'll get their attention so their pockets aren't being so carefully watched.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That is sneaky. I'll keep an eye out for your... distractions.

lines.speaker: Julia
lines.text: Now leave me be. I'm already distracting!
